name: ULTRA INSTINCT STYLE — FLOW STATE PROTOCOL
fantasy: Build a lean, exceptionally responsive physique and learn to move, dodge, and counter without conscious thought — the flow state.
tagline: Train it a thousand times. Then stop thinking.
core_rule_enforcement: Never reward sloppy speed, tension, or flailing. Effortless precision comes from thousands of clean repetitions — rushing with broken form scores nothing.
fight_focus: Angles (L-step, pivot, shift, Cuban cross turn)

fight.requirements: basic strikes and combos (jab-roundhouse); no jumping or spinning strikes; no partner drills
longer combos, angle exits after combos, head-movement requirements, reflex drills; bag recommended

fit.resistance: advanced bodyweight progressions (muscle-ups, archer work) or loaded

fight.requirements: Tekken-style long combos (jab, cross to body, low switch kick, cross, lead shovel, high roundhouse), spinning strikes, counter-strike windows, flow rounds at pace; intended for experienced athletes

meditation_rule: Meditation blocks appear across the campaign (pre-session visualization round, evening meditation). They are completion-only: no difficulty, no failure state, and skipping them never blocks a stage — but completing every one earns the Calm Mind achievement.

equipment_profiles.rule: Every stage must support at least the MINIMAL version. Partner drills (tennis-ball dodgeball, gladiator stick, pad work) are always optional — solo alternatives are provided.

achievements.name: A Thousand Fists
achievements.trigger: Complete every repetition round in Stage 2

achievements.name: Perfect Angles
achievements.trigger: Clear Stage 5 cone rounds without standing in the pocket

achievements.name: Untouchable
achievements.trigger: Complete all Stage 6 dodging drills cleanly

achievements.name: Sharp Reflexes
achievements.trigger: Complete every reflex-training block in the campaign

achievements.name: Calm Mind
achievements.trigger: Complete every meditation block in the campaign

achievements.name: Mastered Instinct
achievements.trigger: Clear Fit and Fight for all 12 stages

causes: Technique or landing control breaks down
response: Preserve the Fight difficulty where appropriate

causes: Rushing and flailing instead of flowing
Guard or head movement repeatedly abandoned
response: Recommend slowing down — flow before speed
Drop Fight difficulty by one level
Do NOT automatically lower the Fit path

round_objectives: Breath and stillness — stance, guard, breathing
Pure defense — slips, rolls, ducks, no strikes
Dodge and return — defense into counter
Reflex burst — react on cue, freestyle
Flow state — moderate pace, minimum thought
Flow under fire — high pace, stay loose

fit_final_test.rule: Predetermined targets only — never uncontrolled maximum-until-collapse work.
